member.name: T:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdCapabilities
member.summary: Capability flags discovered from a userspace Fastboot implementation.
member.param: Indicates whether getvar:is-userspace reports userspace Fastboot.
Indicates whether dynamic partition metadata is advertised.
Indicates whether logical partition operations are available.
Indicates whether snapshot update status is advertised.
Indicates whether Virtual A/B support is inferred from snapshot update support.
The reported super partition name, when available.
The reported snapshot update status, when available.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdCapabilities.#ctor(System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Capability flags discovered from a userspace Fastboot implementation.
member.param: Indicates whether getvar:is-userspace reports userspace Fastboot.
Indicates whether dynamic partition metadata is advertised.
Indicates whether logical partition operations are available.
Indicates whether snapshot update status is advertised.
Indicates whether Virtual A/B support is inferred from snapshot update support.
The reported super partition name, when available.
The reported snapshot update status, when available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdCapabilities.IsUserspace
member.summary: Indicates whether getvar:is-userspace reports userspace Fastboot.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdCapabilities.SupportsDynamicPartitions
member.summary: Indicates whether dynamic partition metadata is advertised.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdCapabilities.SupportsLogicalPartitions
member.summary: Indicates whether logical partition operations are available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdCapabilities.SupportsSnapshotUpdates
member.summary: Indicates whether snapshot update status is advertised.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdCapabilities.SupportsVirtualAb
member.summary: Indicates whether Virtual A/B support is inferred from snapshot update support.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdCapabilities.SuperPartitionName
member.summary: The reported super partition name, when available.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdCapabilities.SnapshotUpdateStatus
member.summary: The reported snapshot update status, when available.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClient
member.summary: Client for userspace Fastboot operations.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClient.Device
member.summary: Gets the connected userspace Fastboot device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClient.Capabilities
member.summary: Gets the capabilities discovered from the connected userspace Fastboot implementation.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClient.ConnectAsync(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.AndroidDevice,AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClientOptions,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connects to userspace Fastboot, optionally transitioning from bootloader Fastboot first.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClient.DetectCapabilitiesAsync(AdbSharp.Fastboot.FastbootClient,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Probes userspace Fastboot capabilities without taking ownership of the client.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClient.FlashLogicalPartitionAsync(System.String,System.IO.Stream,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.IProgress{AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Flashes a logical partition.
member.param: The image length. When omitted, the stream must be seekable.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClient.FlashSparseLogicalPartitionAsync(System.String,System.IO.Stream,System.IProgress{AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Flashes a sparse image to a logical partition.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClient.CreateLogicalPartitionAsync(System.String,System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a logical partition.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClient.DeleteLogicalPartitionAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Deletes a logical partition.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClient.ResizeLogicalPartitionAsync(System.String,System.Int64,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Resizes a logical partition.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClient.UpdateSuperAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates super partition metadata using a previously downloaded image.
member.param: Whether to wipe existing logical partitions.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClient.UpdateSuperAsync(System.String,System.IO.Stream,System.Nullable{System.Int64},System.Boolean,System.IProgress{AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Downloads a super image and updates super partition metadata.
member.param: The image length. When omitted, the stream must be seekable.
Whether to wipe existing logical partitions.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClient.SnapshotUpdateAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Executes a snapshot update command when supported by the device.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClient.GetVarAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a Fastboot variable from the userspace device.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClientOptions
member.summary: Options used when connecting to a userspace Fastboot device.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClientOptions.FastbootOptions
member.summary: Gets or sets the underlying Fastboot options.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClientOptions.AllowAutomaticTransition
member.summary: Gets or sets whether bootloader Fastboot devices may be rebooted to userspace Fastboot automatically.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClientOptions.TransitionTimeout
member.summary: Gets or sets the timeout used while waiting for a device to reappear in userspace Fastboot.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClientOptions.RediscoveryPollInterval
member.summary: Gets or sets the delay between rediscovery attempts after reboot-fastboot.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClientOptions.RediscoverFastbootdAsync
member.summary: Gets or sets an optional rediscovery callback used after reboot-fastboot.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.UnifiedFastbootFlasher
member.summary: Provides unified flashing helpers that route operations to bootloader Fastboot or userspace Fastboot.
Flashes a partition using bootloader Fastboot or userspace Fastboot based on device capability probes.
member.param: The image length. When omitted, the stream must be seekable.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.UnifiedFastbootFlasher.FlashSparsePartitionAsync(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.AndroidDevice,System.String,System.IO.Stream,AdbSharp.Fastbootd.FastbootdClientOptions,System.IProgress{AdbSharp.Common.Diagnostics.TransferProgress},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Flashes a sparse image using bootloader Fastboot or userspace Fastboot based on device capability probes.

member.name: T:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.UnifiedFlashResult
member.summary: Result returned by a unified Fastboot or Fastbootd flash operation.
member.param: The device used for the terminal flash command.
Indicates whether userspace Fastboot handled the flash command.
Indicates whether the partition was detected as logical.
Sparse image metadata when a sparse image was flashed.

member.name: M:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.UnifiedFlashResult.#ctor(AdbSharp.Common.Devices.AndroidDevice,System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,AdbSharp.Fastboot.Sparse.SparseImageInfo)
member.summary: Result returned by a unified Fastboot or Fastbootd flash operation.
member.param: The device used for the terminal flash command.
Indicates whether userspace Fastboot handled the flash command.
Indicates whether the partition was detected as logical.
Sparse image metadata when a sparse image was flashed.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.UnifiedFlashResult.Device
member.summary: The device used for the terminal flash command.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.UnifiedFlashResult.Partition
member.summary: The partition that was flashed.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.UnifiedFlashResult.UsedFastbootd
member.summary: Indicates whether userspace Fastboot handled the flash command.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.UnifiedFlashResult.PartitionWasLogical
member.summary: Indicates whether the partition was detected as logical.

member.name: P:AdbSharp.Fastbootd.UnifiedFlashResult.SparseImage
member.summary: Sparse image metadata when a sparse image was flashed.
